zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Lowther於1368年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德洛福黑時，他的父親Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop28歲，母親Margaret Quale24歲。他於大約1398年與Margaret Strickland結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1430年4月14日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Lowther于1368年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德洛福黑时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop28岁，母亲Margaret Quale24岁。他于大约1398年与Margaret Strickland结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1430年4月14日在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德洛福黑享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德洛福黑。

nameMeanings.name: Lowther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lawther
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lowther   and   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lauder
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Lowther was born in 1368, in Lowther, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Quale, was 24. He married Margaret Strickland about 1398. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 April 1430, in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Lowther est né en 1368, à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Quale, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Strickland environ 1398. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1430, à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Lowther 1368 in Lowther, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Quale 24. Er hat um 1398 Margaret Strickland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. April 1430 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Lowther è nato il nel 1368 nel Lowther, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Quale, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Strickland circa 1398. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 aprile 1430, nel Lowther, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Lowther, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Lowtherが1368年にイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythopは28歳，母Margaret Qualeは24歳であった。約1398年にMargaret Stricklandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1430年4月14日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Lowther(이)가 1368년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 로터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Quale(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1398년 Margaret Strickland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 4월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Lowther nasceu em 1368, em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Quale, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Strickland aproximadamente 1398. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1430, em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Lowther родился в 1368 г. в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Quale, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Strickland около 1398 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 апреля 1430 г. в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Lowther nació en 1368, en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Lowther IV of Wythop, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Quale, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret Strickland aproximadamente 1398. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de abril de 1430, en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
